daily.today_energy: Your intuition is running hot today, Scorpio. Trust those gut feelings pulling you toward certain people and situations—your inner compass knows what's up. Lean into the mysterious vibes.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's a romantic interest or a friend, expect a meaningful check-in that lands differently today. Your authenticity is magnetic rn.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is peak right now. That project or task that felt stuck? A fresh angle reveals itself when you stop forcing it. Let your natural detective skills do the heavy lifting.
daily.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest today—not because you're tired, but because slowing down helps you process everything you've been holding. Gentle movement or stillness both hit different.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is inviting you to trust your gut instincts more than usual. Mercury's moving in your favor, making it a solid time to speak up about what actually matters to you. Things might feel a bit intense, but that's just you getting clarity.
weekly.love: If you've been holding back on vulnerability, the cosmos is basically daring you to go there. Singles might vibe with someone unexpectedly. Taken Scorpios? Now's the time to have those real conversations you've been avoiding. Authenticity hits different.
weekly.career: Your professional energy is magnetic right now. People are noticing your effort and dedication. This isn't the time to play small—pitch that idea, take on that project. The momentum is building, and you're exactly where you need to be for growth.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more intentional rest and movement. Whether that's yoga, walks, or just unplugging from your phone, listen to what feels grounding. Your nervous system will thank you for honoring those needs this week.
